kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: ${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.msg: Argument types are: <class 'int'> <class 'str'>
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8000/ues/3 path_url=/ues/3 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
${response} = <Response [200]>
